title: Motivation
questions: Do you find it easy to motivate yourself?
How do you motivate yourself?
Do people ever call you lazy?
What things motivate you most? Why?
What demotivates you most? Why?
How do you feel about studying? Are you motivated to do it? Why?
Are you motivated to exercise? Why?
What do activity do you have no motivation to do?
What do you think about people who are super motivated?
Do you think you have to enjoy an activity to be motivated to do it? Why?
What about things you don't enjoy but are important?
What do you think about self-help strategies? Could they help people?
Have you ever used any self-help strategies?
What is the difference between motivation and inspiration?
Who is the most motivated person you know? Why?
Who is the least motivated person you know? Why?
Does the weather affect your motivation?
Which type of weather and why?
How do you stay motivated when you're not in a good mood?

How does your English teacher motivate you to study English? What do you think an English teacher should do to motivate his/her students? For example: Should he/she test students regularly, teach lots of grammar or do lots of roleplays in class?
How do you motivate people to do things for you? Do you offer to help them if they help you? Do you encourage them, bribe them, threaten them?
Do you always find it easy to motivate yourself to do something?
